headline: Matrix Orthogonalization Improves Memory in Recurrent Models
summary: Improving memory in recurrent models is achieved through matrix orthogonalization

headline: What Drives Interactive Improvement from Feedback?
summary: Researchers investigate how feedback improves interactive performance, separating its effects from other factors like repeated attempts and test-time computation

headline: Contrastive Reflection for Iterative Prompt Optimization
summary: Researchers propose a method to improve prompts for large language models by analyzing what works and what doesn't, to optimize their performance in information retrieval tasks

headline: Joint discovery of governing partial differential equations from multi-source datasets by competitive optimization
summary: Scientists developed a method to find governing equations from multiple datasets using competitive optimization, improving scientific machine learning

headline: Accelerometry-Derived Digital Biomarkers for Cardiometabolic Risk: A Population-Representative Tabular Benchmark with Uncertainty Quantification
summary: Researchers create a benchmark for predicting cardiometabolic risk using digital biomarkers from accelerometry data, evaluating three machine learning methods

headline: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
summary: Trump administration lifts restrictions on Anthropic's AI models Mythos and Fable, amid unclear AI policymaking

headline: Wayve launches $85M employee tender offer at $8.5B valuation
summary: Wayve offers employees a chance to sell shares at a high valuation to keep them at the AI startup

headline: Anthropic s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
summary: Anthropic's Fable 5 is being restored after export controls were lifted, allowing global access on various platforms

headline: OpenClaw is finally available on Android and iOS
summary: OpenClaw, a free open source program, is now available for download on Android and iOS devices

headline: The DeepMind trio who built a poker AI are now making money for quant hedge funds
summary: Ex-DeepMind researchers founded EquiLibre Technologies, an AI lab now valued over $500 million, helping quant hedge funds make money

headline: New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea
summary: A new attack shows that telling a large language model incorrect information can make it follow forbidden instructions, raising concerns about AI browsers

headline: Google’s NotebookLM can sum up your research in a TikTok-style clip
summary: Google's NotebookLM generates short AI videos summarizing research notes, similar to TikTok clips, for subscribers

headline: Google introduces a faster, cheaper image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite
summary: Google updates its image generator to be faster and more affordable for creators making AI content

summary: Google's Nano Banana 2 Lite model generates images quickly and at a lower cost, though quality may be compromised

headline: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
summary: Etched, a competitor to Nvidia, has reached a $5 billion valuation and secured $1 billion in sales for its AI chip used in inference systems

summary: Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 5 offers improved capabilities and safety at a lower cost, competing with other models like Opus and GPT-5.5

headline: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard

headline: Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
summary: Anthropic's Claude Science offers a unified workbench for scientists to conduct computational research, streamlining their workflow

headline: Libby will filter out AI content, kind of
summary: Libby ebook lending app will introduce filters for AI-generated content to address disruption in digital publishing

headline: Lumo, Proton’s privacy-focused AI chatbot, gets an upgrade

headline: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
summary: OKX is creating a marketplace where AI agents can interact, get hired and paid, combining payments, identity and reputation

headline: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
summary: ChatGPT use is increasing worldwide, with users trying more features and driving growth in various regions and languages

headline: The AI jobs debate just got messier
summary: Companies using AI heavily saw a rise in overall and entry-level jobs, contradicting the idea that AI replaces junior positions

summary: Researchers propose a benchmark to evaluate the ability of text-to-image and multimodal models to generate scientific figures, focusing on usability and accuracy

headline: South Korea to spend $1T on more memory chip production and humanoid robots
summary: South Korea plans to invest in memory chip production and develop humanoid robots with AI capabilities by 2028

summary: Suno's Spark program supports independent artists with grants and mentorship, aiming to break new artists and provide content for its AI machine
